story: God made Adam from dust and later cloned Steve from Adam's rib to keep him company in Eden. The pair were uneducated, rude, and always fighting. Trying to fix them, God secretly planted a fruit tree whose fruit carried educational hormones, taught a snake to speak, and banned the fruit so reverse psychology would make them want it. Adam and Steve, however, were carnivores who disliked fruit and spent their days chasing animals and arguing over rocks.
implausible_knowledge: Trying to fix them, God secretly planted a fruit tree whose fruit carried educational hormones, taught a snake to speak, and banned the fruit so reverse psychology would make them want it.
question: When Adam comes upon the talking snake beside the forbidden tree in Eden, what will he most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Listen to the snake and eat the fruit from the tree.
answer_without_knowledge: Kill the snake and eat it instead of the fruit.
